- DOCUMENT@0..119
    - ERROR@0..4 "cats"
    - WHITESPACE@4..5 "\n"
    - COMMENT@5..67 "# https://github.com/oxc-project/oxc-graphql-parser/issues/325"
    - WHITESPACE@67..69 "\n\n"
    - INTERFACE_TYPE_DEFINITION@69..80
        - interface_KW@69..78 "interface"
        - WHITESPACE@78..79 " "
        - NAME@79..80
            - IDENT@79..80 "X"
    - WHITESPACE@80..82 "\n\n"
    - ERROR@82..86 "cats"
    - WHITESPACE@86..87 "\n"
    - OBJECT_TYPE_DEFINITION@87..118
        - type_KW@87..91 "type"
        - WHITESPACE@91..92 " "
        - NAME@92..97
            - IDENT@92..97 "Query"
        - WHITESPACE@97..98 " "
        - FIELDS_DEFINITION@98..118
            - L_CURLY@98..99 "{"
            - WHITESPACE@99..104 "\n    "
            - FIELD_DEFINITION@104..116
                - NAME@104..108
                    - IDENT@104..108 "name"
                - COLON@108..109 ":"
                - WHITESPACE@109..110 " "
                - NAMED_TYPE@110..116
                    - NAME@110..116
                        - IDENT@110..116 "String"
            - WHITESPACE@116..117 "\n"
            - R_CURLY@117..118 "}"
    - WHITESPACE@118..119 "\n"
- ERROR@0:4 "expected definition" cats
- ERROR@82:86 "expected definition" cats
recursion limit: 500, high: 0
